Syed Shakil Haider Sabazwari

A Journey of Courage, Perseverance and Success

About Him

Born on 30 September 1972 in Rawat Radio Colony, Syed Shakil Haider Sabazwari spent his childhood and youth in Rawat. He completed his education there and later earned a Master's Degree in Political Science. His life was marked by challenges from an early age, yet he faced them with courage and determination.

His Story

He lost his mother during childhood and grew up with limited support. Despite facing many hardships, he never gave up. He tried different professions, experienced failures, and kept moving forward. Through intelligence, patience, and relentless hard work, he eventually built a respected career and achieved financial stability.

When he got married, he did not have a stable job. His wife stood beside him and supported him through difficult times. Together they faced challenges, and eventually his efforts paid off, allowing him to provide a comfortable and fulfilling life for his family.

Family & Character

A loving husband and father of five children (three sons and two daughters), he is known for his knowledge, courage, positive attitude, warm heart, and dedication to family. He loves cars and always strives to do whatever he can for the people he loves.

A Daughter's Tribute ❤️

Dear Baba,

I love you so much. You are my hero, my inspiration, and my greatest example of strength. Your life teaches me that success comes to those who never stop trying. Thank you for every sacrifice, every struggle, and every effort you made for our family.

You are, and always will be, the best.

With all my love,
Syeda Hoorulain Haider Sabazwari

Made with ❤️ by Your Loving Daughter
